free_text: Reactions of cesium with protons at 60, 80, 100, 150,
and 240 MeV
Experiment performed at the Rochester
130-inch cyclotron.
Spectroscopically-pure cesium chloride with weight of
200 Mg wrapped in a single sheet of aluminum foil 3.8
cm long, 0.3 cm wide, and 0.2 cm thick, covered by Al
monitor foils 0.001-inch thick.
Beta activity was measured using extremely-
stable methane flow beta-proportional counter
Activation method with chemical
separation of radionuclides in irradiated sample was
used.
authors assume reaction 27Al(p,3pn)24Na
Compiled by S.H.
BP: Typo fix in subentry 4,13 per
WP2023-21 and feedback list, added doi.
